name: Fesenjan - Iranian Duck with Walnuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove all excess fat from the duck and brown the quarters lightly in a large casserole.
2. Lift out the duck and fry the onions until browned.
3. Add the walnuts and water to the pan. Season with salt and pepper.
4. Return the duck to the pan, then bring the sauce to a boil.
5. Simmer for about an hour until the duck is almost tender.
6. Stir in pomegranate syrup, sugar, and lemon juice.
7. Skim as much fat as possible from the casserole.
8. Continue simmering for another 30 minutes until the sauce is quite dark. If needed, add a little more water to thin the sauce.
9. Serve with rice.
